models.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

devices.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition
NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

serve_commands.nomtp:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
export VLLM_ENGINE_READY_TIMEOUT_S=3600
export CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES="0,1"
<home-path> serve deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Flash --trust-remote-code --kv-cache-dtype fp8 --block-size 256 --max-model-len 393216 --tensor-parallel-size 2 --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 --no-enable-flashinfer-autotune --reasoning-parser deepseek_v4 --tokenizer-mode deepseek_v4 --tool-call-parser deepseek_v4 --enable-auto-tool-choice --gpu-memory-utilization 0.985

contents.report: Readable baseline report with correctness, performance, and cost metrics.
contents.generation: Directory-driven writing, translation, and coding transcripts.
contents.oracle: Deterministic /v1/completions logprobs oracle cases. The oracle root is the no-MTP compatibility entrypoint; oracle/nomtp and oracle/mtp keep variant-specific copies when present.
contents.smoke: no-MTP and MTP chat smoke request/response captures.
contents.toolcall15: no-MTP and MTP ToolCall-15 traces and scores.
contents.kv_layout: Synthetic packed KV byte-layout snapshots for indexer-cache regressions.
contents.long_context: Long-context sentinel retrieval probes for cache-layout regressions.
contents.evals: Optional lm_eval accuracy summaries such as GSM8K exact match.
contents.performance: Benchmark, runtime, and GPU telemetry summaries.
